title: Manimajra Fort
tagline: Manimajra Fort — heritage city of Chandigarh

overview.short: Manimajra Fort, is a fort situated in Mani Majra, Chandigarh (city of Indian Union).
overview.description: Manimajra Fort, is a fort situated in Mani Majra, Chandigarh (city of Indian Union). It is over 360 years old and has become more popular with the shooting of the Oscar-winning movie Zero Dark Thirty. It was built by Gharib Dass Dhillon of Dhillon clan as the capital of his newly created state of 84 villages.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Daun kalan
topPlaces.description: Daun kalan is a village in Patiala district, India. The Daun Kalan village has population of 3482 of which 1868 are males while 1614 are females as per Population Census 2011.

topPlaces.name: Rurki Kasba
topPlaces.description: Rurki Kasba is a census town in Patiala district in the Indian state of Punjab.

topPlaces.name: Saidkheri
topPlaces.description: Said Kheri is a village situated in Rajpura Tehsil of Patiala District, India. This village was established by a Muslim saint Said Raju, who was also known as Zinda Pir.

topPlaces.name: Bahadurgarh Fort
topPlaces.description: Bahadurgarh Fort is a historical Sikh-fort near Patiala in Punjab, India. Constructed on the site of the old Saifabad Fort, which was built as the residence of Nawab Saif ud-Din Mahmud or Saif Khan, the fort was renovated by Maharaja Karam Singh of the princely state of Patiala in 1837.

topPlaces.name: Bhatt Majra, Patiala
topPlaces.description: Bhatt Majra is a village in the Patiala district of Punjab state of India.

items.note: Daun kalan is a village in Patiala district, India. The Daun Kalan village has population of 3482 of which 1868 are males while 1614 are females as per Population Census 2011.
Rurki Kasba is a census town in Patiala district in the Indian state of Punjab.
Said Kheri is a village situated in Rajpura Tehsil of Patiala District, India. This village was established by a Muslim saint Said Raju, who was also known as Zinda Pir.

Bahadurgarh Fort is a historical Sikh-fort near Patiala in Punjab, India. Constructed on the site of the old Saifabad Fort, which was built as the residence of Nawab Saif ud-Din Mahmud or Saif Khan, the fort was renovated by Maharaja Karam Singh of the princely state of Patiala in 1837.
Bhatt Majra is a village in the Patiala district of Punjab state of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Manimajra Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Manimajra Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Manimajra Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Ambala Cantt Junction (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Manimajra Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Manimajra Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Manimajra Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Manimajra Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Manimajra Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Daun kalan, Rurki Kasba, Saidkheri, Bahadurgarh Fort, Bhatt Majra, Patiala.
